strategies.name: Turquoise-core ORA (multi-cutoff)
steps: Sort turquoise genes by kME descending
Map to mouse Entrez
Run enrichGO (BP/MF) + enrichKEGG at each cutoff
Report pathways surviving >=2 cutoffs

strategies.name: kME-ranked GSEA
steps: Rank ALL 5000 genes by kME to turquoise module eigengene
Run gseGO (BP) with clusterProfiler
Run GSEA on KEGG with gseKEGG
Compare with round-1 ORA results

strategies.name: ECM score vs module eigengene
steps: Define ECM gene list from MSigDB HALLMARK_EMT + REACTOME_ECM
Compute ssGSEA score per sample using GSVA
Correlate ECM score with each module eigengene (Pearson)
Report r and p-value for turquoise and brown

strategies.name: Signed network sensitivity
steps: Re-run blockwiseModules with networkType='signed'
Re-evaluate soft threshold (pickSoftThreshold)
Compare module structure: module sizes, hub genes, preservation Z
Report if turquoise/brown survive signed network

scripts_needed.name: 08_turquoise_core_ora.R
scripts_needed.purpose: ORA on top-kME turquoise genes at multiple cutoffs

scripts_needed.name: 09_kme_ranked_gsea.R
scripts_needed.purpose: GSEA using kME ranking for turquoise module

scripts_needed.name: 10_ecm_score_correlation.R
scripts_needed.purpose: ECM ssGSEA score vs module eigengene correlation

scripts_needed.name: 11_signed_network.R
scripts_needed.purpose: Signed network construction and module comparison

key_decisions: Use MSigDB external gene sets for ECM score, not module-derived
Test multiple kME cutoffs (100/200/500) for robustness
Signed network may require different power; re-run pickSoftThreshold
GSEA uses all 5000 genes ranked, not just turquoise genes

strategies.name: Turquoise 核心 ORA（多截断）
steps: 按 kME 降序排列 turquoise 基因
映射到小鼠 Entrez
在每个截断运行 enrichGO (BP/MF) + enrichKEGG
报告在 >=2 截断存活的通路

strategies.name: kME 排序 GSEA
steps: 按 kME 对所有 5000 基因排序
用 clusterProfiler 运行 gseGO (BP)
运行 gseKEGG
与第一轮 ORA 结果比较

strategies.name: ECM 评分 vs 模块 eigengene
steps: 从 MSigDB HALLMARK_EMT + REACTOME_ECM 定义 ECM 基因列表
用 GSVA 计算每样本 ssGSEA 评分
计算 ECM 评分与各模块 eigengene 的 Pearson 相关
报告 turquoise 和 brown 的 r 和 p 值

strategies.name: Signed network 敏感性
steps: 用 networkType='signed' 重新运行 blockwiseModules
重新评估 soft threshold
比较模块结构：模块大小、hub 基因、保存性 Z
报告 turquoise/brown 是否在 signed network 中存活

scripts_needed.name: 08_turquoise_core_ora.R
scripts_needed.purpose: 在多个截断对 top-kME turquoise 基因运行 ORA

scripts_needed.name: 09_kme_ranked_gsea.R
scripts_needed.purpose: 用 kME 排序对 turquoise 模块运行 GSEA

scripts_needed.name: 10_ecm_score_correlation.R
scripts_needed.purpose: ECM ssGSEA 评分 vs 模块 eigengene 相关

scripts_needed.name: 11_signed_network.R
scripts_needed.purpose: Signed network 构建和模块比较

key_decisions: 使用 MSigDB 外部基因集计算 ECM 评分，不用模块衍生基因
测试多个 kME 截断（100/200/500）验证稳健性
Signed network 可能需要不同 power；重新运行 pickSoftThreshold
GSEA 使用所有 5000 基因排序，不只是 turquoise 基因
